sample_explanations.label: High Confidence Example
sample_explanations.explanation: This air quality measurement has excellent data quality (score: 94.1/100). The data is highly reliable with minimal issues, making it suitable for detailed analysis and regulatory compliance. Minimal missing data (5.9%). Recommended for: regulatory compliance, health advisories, and predictive modeling.

sample_explanations.label: Medium Confidence Example
sample_explanations.explanation: This air quality measurement has fair data quality (score: 70.6/100). The data has moderate reliability with some quality concerns, suitable for general trend analysis. Some data points missing (29.4%). Recommended for: general monitoring and trend observation.

sample_explanations.label: Low Confidence Example
sample_explanations.explanation: This air quality measurement has poor data quality (score: 64.7/100). The data has low reliability with significant quality issues, recommended for exploratory analysis only. Significant missing data (35.3%) reduces reliability. Use for data exploration only.

sample_explanations.label: Best Quality Example
sample_explanations.explanation: This air quality measurement has excellent data quality (score: 94.1/100). The data is highly reliable with minimal issues, making it suitable for detailed analysis and regulatory compliance. Minimal missing data (5.9%). Recommended for: regulatory compliance, health advisories, and predictive modeling.

sample_explanations.label: Worst Quality Example
sample_explanations.explanation: This air quality measurement has very poor data quality (score: 11.8/100). The data has low reliability with significant quality issues, recommended for exploratory analysis only. Significant missing data (88.2%) reduces reliability. Use for data exploration only.
